task_description: Implement 6 UX/state-sync improvements: realtime hotkey state sync in UI, toast overlay system, Ctrl+Enter animation fix, lower opacity minimum to 0%, font weight control, and stealth process naming.

verification.summary: npm install succeeds, prettier --check passes on all modified files, storage module loads with correct defaults (opacityMin=0, fontWeight=400, hotkeyToastsEnabled=true), package.json shows stealth names, HARD_LIMITS.opacityMin=0.0 in window.js. No test suite exists in this project.

review_result: Issues 1-2 fixed (ambiguous toast, event listener leak). Issue 3 (0% opacity) kept as-is per user request. Issue 4 (stale toast) is cosmetic/minor, not fixed.
